info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp is a comprehensive e-commerce platform API that allows seamless integration and management of online store functionalities.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog management including listing, creation, and updates.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints to manage customer orders, track status, and handle order history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profile updates.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Payment processing and transaction management endpoints.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the shopping cart contents associated with the specified userId. Returns the current items and their quantities in the user's cart.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's shopping cart

example.message: The provided userId is not valid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product and quantity to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart contents after addition.

requestBody.description: Details of the cart item to add including product and quantity

200.description: Item successfully added to cart, returning updated cart

400.description: Invalid request data for adding cart item

example.message: The cart item data is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the user
post.description: Creates a new order based on the current cart contents for the specified userId. Returns details of the placed order including order ID and status.

example.message: The order placement request is invalid or missing required information.

details.issue: UserId is required and must be valid

example.message: No active cart found for the specified userId.

details.issue: No cart exists for this userId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches the full details of an order identified by orderId, including order items, status, and shipment information.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the order details

example.message: The orderId provided is not valid.
No order found with the specified orderId.

details.issue: No matching order for this orderId

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process based on the provided payment request details such as amount, method, and order information. Returns payment transaction details upon initiation.

requestBody.description: Payment details required to initiate a transaction

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Payment method is missing or not supported

example.message: Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or declined transaction.

details.issue: Payment was declined by the provider

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receives payment webhook notifications to update payment status. The request body contains details about the payment event sent by the payment provider. A successful processing returns the current payment response reflecting the updated state.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment webhook event data

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or missing required fields

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or is malformed.

402.description: Payment required or failed processing due to payment status

example.message: The payment status indicates a required action or failure.

details.issue: Payment is in a failed or pending state requiring user action.

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred while processing payment webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the catalog with the details specified in the request body, such as name, description, price, and inventory. Returns the added product with its assigned identifiers and metadata.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to be added

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 1600 DPI sensor

400.description: Invalid product data or missing required fields

example.message: The product data provided is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Conflict due to product SKU already existing

example.message: A product with the given SKU already exists.

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred while adding product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve tracking information for a shipment
get.description: Fetches the current tracking status and location history for the shipment of the specified order identified by orderId. Returns detailed tracking data including estimated delivery.

404.description: Order or tracking information not found

example.message: Tracking information for the specified order could not be found.

details.issue: Order ID 'ord-7b3d8f2a' does not exist or has no tracking info

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred while retrieving tracking information

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided registration information including username, email, and password. On success, returns the newly created user's profile information.

400.description: Invalid registration data or validation failure

example.message: One or more fields are invalid in the registration data.

409.description: User account with provided email or username already exists

example.message: A user account with the provided email or username already exists.

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred during user registration

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the prices, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this item.

price.description: Original price per unit of the product.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after applying discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cart.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for this order item.

price.description: Original price per unit of the product ordered.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the ordered product.

createdAt.description: Order creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order prices.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total payable amount after discounts and adjustments.

paymentStatus.description: Current status of the order payment.

status.description: Current overall status of the order.

totalAmount.description: Total original amount for the order before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discounts applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the order.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid.

currency.description: The currency code for the payment amount, following ISO 4217 standard.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order related to this payment.

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway to process this payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment such as credit card or PayPal.

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment.

orderId.description: Order identifier tied to this payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the payment.

status.description: Current status of the payment (e.g., successful, pending, failed).

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction assigned by the payment gateway.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message received from the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment related to the webhook event.

status.description: Status update from the payment gateway for this payment.

transactionId.description: Transaction ID as reported by the payment gateway.

available.description: Availability status of the product in inventory.

category.description: Category under which the product is classified.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

stock.description: Quantity of product units in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: The brand name of the product

createdAt.description: Date and time when the product was created in the system (ISO 8601 format)

currency.description: Currency code for the product price (ISO 4217 format)

description.example: High-quality noise-cancelling headphones with Bluetooth connectivity

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product (scale 1-5)

stock.description: Number of product units currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the product information was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time (ISO 8601 format)

lastUpdated.description: Date and time when the tracking information was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Courier tracking ID for the shipment

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

country.description: Country in which the user resides

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions (ISO 4217 code)

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user account was created (ISO 8601 format)

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency for transactions (ISO 4217 code)

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the user information was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

userType.description: Role or type assigned to the user

error.description: A brief description of the error type.

status.description: HTTP status code associated with the error.

timestamp.description: The time when the error occurred in ISO8601 format.

path.description: The API endpoint path that was called.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request to facilitate tracking.

errorCode.description: Specific code representing the error type.

details.description: A list of detailed issues related to the error.

field.description: The specific field in the input that caused the problem.

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field.

error.description: A brief description of the server error.

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error.

status.description: HTTP status code representing the server error.

timestamp.description: The time when the server error occurred in ISO8601 format.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request to assist in tracking server issues.
